global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body, predominantly black and white plumage. It features bold black and white stripes running along its back and wings, with a distinctive black cap on its head. The underparts are white, and the bird has a thin, pointed beak.

part_details.head: Black cap with white stripes extending to the nape.
part_details.wings: Black and white striped pattern, elongated and narrow.
part_details.back: Bold black and white stripes running longitudinally.
part_details.underparts: Smooth white feathers covering the belly and chest.
part_details.beak: Thin, pointed, and slightly curved, dark in color.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head, extending to the nape.
The striped wings are positioned laterally along the body.
The white underparts are located beneath the striped back.
